gradients.rule: No gradients. Flat colors only for maximum data clarity.

grid_system.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-4 p-4 md:p-6

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-orange-600 rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider text-xs font-bold px-6 py-3 transition-colors duration-200
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-100 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-200 rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider text-xs font-bold px-6 py-3
buttons.outline: border border-slate-300 bg-transparent hover:border-slate-900 text-slate-900 rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider text-xs font-bold px-6 py-3

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-sm p-6 relative overflow-hidden

status_badges.success: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200 uppercase text-[10px] font-bold tracking-widest px-2 py-1
status_badges.warning: bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 border border-amber-200 uppercase text-[10px] font-bold tracking-widest px-2 py-1
status_badges.error: bg-red-100 text-red-700 border border-red-200 uppercase text-[10px] font-bold tracking-widest px-2 py-1
status_badges.neutral: bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 uppercase text-[10px] font-bold tracking-widest px-2 py-1

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise/grain on the sidebar navigation background only.
visual_enhancers.decorations: Use 1px grid lines (opacity 10%) in the dashboard background to emphasize precision.
visual_enhancers.borders: All borders should be 1px solid. No fuzzy borders.

motion.guidelines: Fast, linear, and efficient. No bounces. No springs.

images.style: Black and white filters for avatars. High contrast technical diagrams.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px. Sharp edges where possible.

charts.style: Minimalist. No grid lines on charts if possible. Tooltips must be high contrast (Black bg, White text).

universal_guidelines: Do not use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. Maximum rounded-sm.
Headings must be uppercase and condensed.
Use distinct borders for separation, not shadows.
Interactive elements must have a clear hover state (text color change or background tint).
Data density should be high. Do not use excessive whitespace inside data tables.
All text must be legible. Minimum contrast ratio 4.5:1.

accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings in Orange (#FF5722) for keyboard navigation.

tech_stack.frontend: React (JS), Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI (Radix), Recharts, Framer Motion

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building the frontend mostly.
Use the 'Bento' grid layout for the main dashboard overview.
The Ticket Analysis Overlay should be a 'Sheet' component (sliding from right) or a 'Dialog' with a very clean, document-like structure.
Ensure all components are strictly typed if using JSDoc/PropTypes, or just clean JS.
Use the images provided for empty states or dashboard decoration.
